judge_reason: Description B claims specific titles ('OUT OUR WAY', 'SIDE GLANCES', 'CARNIVAL') and a copyright line ('COPR. 1946 BY NEA SERVICE, INC.') that are not mentioned in Description A, while also describing different activities (e.g., 'holding a broom' vs. 'holding a shovel') and omitting details like the calendar, creating contradictions on specific visual elements and quoted text.
original_image_tags: Newspaper comic strip panel, part of a vertical column. In the top panel, a man in a cap and work clothes holds a shovel. Another man is partially visible in the background.
Newspaper comic strip panel. A man in a cap stands in profile, smoking a pipe and holding a coiled rope or leash. A house and another figure are in the background.
Newspaper comic strip panel. Shows the back of a man's head and shoulders as he looks out a window at a domed building. A calendar hangs on the wall.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A narrow scanned newspaper clipping showing three black-and-white comic-strip panels stacked vertically, with visible panel titles “OUT OUR WAY,” “SIDE GLANCES,” and “CARNIVAL,” plus partial speech balloons and caption text.*
